<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve public server configuration"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/system/public-server-config"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve information a client may need to know about how the
Kargo API server is configured in order to proceed with
authentication.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
